Cancellation of 50-Hz interference in ECG Suggestion on Project Topics  The objective of Project based learning is to strengthen the understanding of student’s fundamentals through effective application of theoretical concepts. Projects can help to boost student’s skills and widen the horizon of their thinking.  The ultimate aim of an engineering student is to resolve a problem by applying theoretical knowledge.  In the first class

students shall be given an awareness and/or guideline on how to implement and learn this course through a project and form groups.  Each group should identify a project relevant to the subject of study.  Develop the block diagram and present before the jury within first month after the commencement of classes.  Implement necessary hardware and software to develop the prototype.  Prepare a report and present before the jury for final evaluation
